results.name: El Salvador
results.key_finding: FIRST FORMAL BASELINE + only proposal. Never assessed; 20.3 was an un-assessed bulk-import baseline. Codified in-force conduct: indefinite re-election amendment (57-3, Jul 31 2025), May 2025 foreign-agents law, Cristosal forced into exile ('prison or exile'), anti-corruption chief arrested, 140+ HRDs exiled, plus a 3-year state of exception (~87,000 detained, custodial deaths). Downgrade to 15.0 (Critical), band crossing Developing->Critical, delta -5.3. ACT held at 2.4 to credit genuine homicide reduction. Conservative vs peers (above Bahrain 9.4/Mali 12.5, below Venezuela 18/China 19.5).

results.name: China
results.key_finding: Ethnic Unity Law Day 2 codifies already-priced assimilation + Article 63 extraterritorial diaspora liability; no documented Day-2 enforcement. Marginal dock ~-1.5 sub-threshold. Confirm 19.5; forward trigger = first Article 63 enforcement action.

results.name: Lebanon
results.key_finding: Attribution/non-state screen. Renewed war harm is Israel's conduct; Hezbollah's framework rejection is non-state; unrealized ceasefire is not positive evidence. No new Lebanese-state own-conduct. Confirm 17.2.

results.name: Nigeria
results.key_finding: Double-count. 34.8M IPC Phase 3+ / 15,000 Phase 5 Borno already priced in the Jun 19 crossing to 18.0. WFP cuts + formal Phase 5 declaration remain forward triggers. Confirm 18.0.

results.name: Pakistan
results.key_finding: FIRST FULL BASELINE. Prior proposals but no standalone assessment. 2025 monsoon floods (6.9M affected, 1,000+ dead) are exogenous; response weakness (no national emergency) is a watch offset by broad aid acceptance; Afghan deportations + speech law already priced in the May-2025 downgrade. Confirm 17.2 (sidecar reconstructs 16.9 at integer anchors).

results.name: Venezuela
results.key_finding: Exogenous-disaster screen. Earthquake Day 8 toll 2,595 (from 1,943) reflects scale/disclosure, not new government harm. Relief-failure criticism blocks upgrade; broad aid acceptance blocks downgrade. Confirm 18.0.

results.name: Taiwan
results.key_finding: FIRST FORMAL BASELINE. Never assessed. Surfaced on Chinese military/legal pressure (China's conduct, not Taiwan's). Own conduct - universal healthcare, first-in-Asia marriage equality, 91% democratic support - is consistent with Exemplary. Composite reconstructs exactly to 83.0 (base 75 + premium 8, one weak dim EQU 3.5). Confirm 83.0, rank 9.

results.name: Princeton University
results.key_finding: FIRST FORMAL BASELINE. Never assessed. Surfaced on ~$210M federal grant freeze - an exogenous government action, not Princeton harm. Own conduct (no-loan aid EQU 4.0, slavery-legacy work, academic-freedom defense) is consistent with Functional. 7 weak dims zero the premium; base 57.8 matches published. Confirm 57.8, rank 5 (sidecar reconstructs 58.1).

results.name: Mali
results.key_finding: Non-state attribution + calibration flag. JNIM siege harm is non-state; 18.5%-funded response continues the already-priced crisis. Open Sahel-band calibration (Mali 12.5 vs Burkina Faso 6.3) is a coordinator-level flag-for-review, NOT an assessor one-off (3e-bis(5)). Confirm 12.5.

results.name: Ukraine
results.key_finding: Attribution. The Jul 1-2 Kyiv attack (70+ missiles, ~500 drones, 27+ killed) is RUSSIA's conduct, scored against Russia (0.0), not Ukraine. Ukraine's sheltering/rescue response (52,500 in metro) is competent civilian protection consistent with Functional. Confirm 50.0.

results.name: Georgia
results.key_finding: FIRST FORMAL BASELINE. Never assessed. Foreign-agents law + 580-day protest crackdown are chronic/already-priced in the Developing/backsliding score; the only NEW within-window datum is a mild positive (2 activists released Jul 1). Neither clears the threshold. Composite reconstructs to 34.4. Confirm 34.4, rank 106.

results.name: UnitedHealth Group
results.key_finding: Pre-adjudication. DOJ criminal (now Optum Rx/physician-reimbursement) + civil MA-inflation probes are not yet decided in court; Jun 23 takedown is sector context; Senate 'gaming' finding already priced. Confirm 10.2; forward trigger = indictment/ruling/settlement.

results.name: Bahrain
results.key_finding: Attribution/directionality. Amnesty-documented Iranian drone strikes ON Bahrain are Iran's conduct; Doha diplomacy is not a Bahraini rights reform. Bahrain's 9.4 already prices its own repression. No upgrade, no downgrade. Confirm 9.4.

results.name: Burkina Faso
results.key_finding: Double-count + calibration flag. 2.1M IDPs, 3.5M besieged, April 118-NGO dissolution continue the already-priced Jun-1 active-state-perpetration reweight; JNIM siege harm is non-state. Sahel calibration OPEN at coordinator level (3e-bis(5)). Confirm 6.3.

results.name: Democratic Republic of Congo
results.key_finding: Near-floor + exogenous disease. Ebola in a 4th province (Haut-Uele, Jun 29; 1,333 cases/399 deaths; France import) reinforces but cannot meaningfully lower a 2.3 near-floor; M23 harm attributed to Rwanda-backed forces. Confirm 2.3.

false_positives_screened.screened: Ethnic Unity Law Day 2 codifies already-priced assimilation/transnational-repression; Article 63 is a legal claim with no documented Day-2 enforcement. Defensible dock ~-1.5, below 5pt. Confirm 19.5.
Renewed war harm is Israel's conduct; Hezbollah rejection is non-state; unrealized ceasefire is not positive evidence for an upgrade; no new Lebanese-state own-conduct. Confirm 17.2.
34.8M Phase 3+ / 15,000 Phase 5 already priced in the Jun 19 crossing. JNIM attacks non-state. WFP cuts + Phase 5 declaration are forward triggers. Confirm 18.0.

2025 monsoon floods are a natural disaster (exogenous). Afghan deportations + speech law continue the already-priced May-2025 arc that set 17.2 (recent, evidence-driven - stale-baseline rationale INVALID). Response weakness offset by broad aid acceptance. Confirm 17.2.
Earthquake is exogenous; rising Day-8 toll is scale/disclosure not new harm. Relief-failure criticism blocks upgrade; aid acceptance blocks downgrade. Confirm 18.0.

First baseline. Surfaced on Chinese naval/legal coercion - China's conduct, scored against China. Taiwan's defensive Littoral Combat Command is civilian protection, not a compassion harm and not a >=5pt positive swing. Confirm 83.0.

First baseline. The ~$210M federal grant freeze is a government action targeting Princeton, not a Princeton harm event (no downgrade); academic-freedom defense is consistent with 57.8 (no >=5pt upgrade). Confirm 57.8.

JNIM siege harm is non-state; lean-season/IDP/NGO-dissolution figures continue already-priced arcs. Open Sahel-band calibration (Mali 12.5 vs BF 6.3) routed to coordinator-level flag-for-review, NOT resolved as an assessor one-off. Confirm 12.5 / 6.3.

The Jul 1-2 Kyiv mass strike is Russia's conduct, scored against Russia (0.0). An entity surfaced on harm inflicted BY ANOTHER STATE cannot yield a downgrade. Ukraine's civilian-protection response is band-consistent. Confirm 50.0.

First baseline. Foreign-agents law + 580-day crackdown are chronic/already-priced in the Developing score; the only NEW within-window datum is a mild positive (activist releases). Neither clears threshold; no basis for a downgrade on chronic evidence nor an upgrade on a marginal release. Confirm 34.4.
DOJ criminal/civil probes are not yet decided in court; Jun 23 takedown is sector context; Senate 'gaming' finding already priced at near-floor 10.2. Confirm 10.2.
Iranian drone strikes ON Bahrain are Iran's conduct (scored against Iran); Doha diplomacy is not a Bahraini rights reform. Own repression already priced. No upgrade/downgrade. Confirm 9.4.
Ebola spread to a 4th province is an exogenous disease outbreak; M23 harm attributed to Rwanda-backed forces. Reinforces but cannot meaningfully lower a 2.3 near-floor. Confirm 2.3.

sahel_calibration_status: OPEN - coordinator-level Sahel-band reweight review carried forward (Mali 12.5 vs Burkina Faso 6.3). Both confirmed at live baselines; no assessor one-off (3e-bis(5)).

math_hygiene.el_salvador_reconstruct: proposed dims {AWR1.6,EMP1.6,ACT2.4,EQU1.2,BND1.4,ACC1.2,SYS1.8,INT1.6} -> base 12.5 + premium 0 (8 weak dims) = 15.0; delta -5.3 from published 20.3; band crossing Developing->Critical.
math_hygiene.confirmations_reconstruct: Taiwan 83.0 exact (base 75 + premium 8, one weak dim). Georgia integer-anchor sidecar reconstructs 34.4 exact. Princeton 58.1, Pakistan 16.9 differ <=0.3-0.9 from published fractional baselines because half/quarter-step published means (e.g., 1.875, 3.25) are not exactly reproducible from 5 integer subdim anchors; confirmations reported at published composite.
math_hygiene.note: Only El Salvador carries a score change; validate-indexes will be run pre-apply by the coordinator. All confirmations read at live-index baselines from countries.json/universities.json/fortune-500.json.

forward_triggers_logged: El Salvador: enforcement of indefinite re-election in 2027, new mass-detention escalation, or further HRD imprisonment = deeper downgrade; genuine due-process restoration / detainee release with repair = upgrade support.
China: first documented Article 63 extraterritorial enforcement (prosecution/rendition/family detention).
Nigeria: realized WFP cuts + formal IPC Phase 5 famine declaration in Borno.
Pakistan: documented deliberate obstruction of flood relief = downgrade; equitable relief scale-up = upgrade.
Taiwan: cross-strait escalation causing a state failure to protect civilians = downgrade; sustained rights expansion (cross-border families/migrants) = upgrade.
Princeton: forced cuts that measurably degrade staff/student support = ACC watch; capitulation abandoning academic-freedom stance = INT downgrade.
Georgia: mass detentions / banned parties = downgrade; durable release of political prisoners + EU-accession restart = upgrade.
Ukraine: documented Ukrainian-state failure to protect / discriminatory relief = downgrade; verified equitable civilian-protection scale-up = upgrade.
Mali/Burkina Faso: documented state-perpetrated civilian violence or new siege expansion = downgrade; NGO-dissolution reversal + aid-access expansion = upgrade.
Venezuela: deliberate relief obstruction/falsified data = downgrade; equitable relief scale-up = upgrade.
DRC: collapse/obstruction of Ebola response = downgrade; verified containment scale-up = upgrade.
Bahrain: internal crackdown / discriminatory emergency-protection denial = downgrade; political-prisoner release = upgrade.
Lebanon: implemented civilian-protecting ceasefire with the state extending governance/relief = upgrade.
